queries.question: What source value of financing sources is common for all affordable housing projects?
queries.sql: SELECT Financing_Sources.source_value  from Affordable_Housing_Projects_Financing_Sources join Financing_Sources on Affordable_Housing_Projects_Financing_Sources.financing_source_id = Financing_Sources.source_id join Affordable_Housing_Projects on Affordable_Housing_Projects_Financing_Sources.housing_project_id = Affordable_Housing_Projects.project_id   GROUP BY Affordable_Housing_Projects_Financing_Sources.financing_source_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Affordable_Housing_Projects_Financing_Sources.housing_project_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Affordable_Housing_Projects)

queries.question: What source value of financing sources do we have for every affordable housing project?
queries.sql: select affordable_housing_projects.project_name , financing_sources.source_value from Affordable_Housing_Projects_Financing_Sources join Financing_Sources on Affordable_Housing_Projects_Financing_Sources.financing_source_id = Financing_Sources.source_id join Affordable_Housing_Projects on Affordable_Housing_Projects_Financing_Sources.housing_project_id = Affordable_Housing_Projects.project_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?project_name ?source_value WHERE {
  ?affordable_housing_projects_financing_sources a :Affordable_Housing_Projects_Financing_Sources .
  ?financing_sources a :Financing_Sources .
  ?affordable_housing_projects_financing_sources p:hasFinancing_Sources ?financing_sources .
  ?affordable_housing_projects a :Affordable_Housing_Projects .
  ?affordable_housing_projects_financing_sources p:hasAffordable_Housing_Projects ?affordable_housing_projects .
  ?affordable_housing_projects p:project_name ?project_name .
  ?financing_sources p:source_value ?source_value .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What source value of financing sources do we have for every affordable housing project?
